LAW AND MOTION 302, THE HEARING ON DEFENDANT CARLOS AYALA'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS CONTINUED TO AUGUST 28, 2012 AT 9:30 IN DEPARTMENT 302. THE COURT INSTRUCTED THE DEFENDANT TO PROVIDE DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE, SUCH AS PAYSTUBS, BANK STATEMENTS, HOUSEHOLD BILLS AND RECEIPTS, CREDIT CARD STATEMENTS, ETC. AS PROOF OF HIS MONTHLY INCOME AND EXPENSES AT THE NEXT HEARING. THE COURT DID NOT FIND THE HAND WRITTEN LIST THAT MR. AYALA SUBMITTED AT TODAY'S HEARING SATISFACTORY. ORDER CONTINUING THE HEARING WAS SIGNED BY THE COURT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER CSR # 5976

LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING - THE MATTER WAS DISCUSSED. HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS GRANTED. EARNINGS THAT ARE DETERMINED TO BE NECESSARY FOR THE SUPPORT OF THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR OR HIS OR HER FAMILY ARE EXEMPT UNDER CCP 706.051. THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR APPEARED AT THE HEARING AND PROVIDED EVIDENCE SHOWING THAT THE LEVIED FUNDS ARE WAGES AND NECESSARY FOR HIS SUPPORT. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN, CSR # 6185

calendar.matters:
Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Jun-28-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - CARLOS AYALA, TEL. NO. 722-3817, DEFENDANT APPEARING IN PRO PER;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE MATTER WAS DISCUSSED. Hearing On Claim Of Exemption is Granted. Earnings that are determined to be necessary for the support of the Judgment Debtor or his or her family are exempt under CCP 706.051. The Judgment Debtor appeared at the hearing and provided evidence showing that the levied funds are wages and necessary for his support. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR # 6185 = (302/MJM)

Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Jun-06-2013 Continued To Jun-28-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Carlos Ayala, Tel. 415.722.3812, claimant/judgment debtor appearing on his own behalf;
No other appearance.

RULING: The matter was discussed. After hearing, the Court continued the Hearing on DEFENDANT CARLOS AYALA'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTION to June 28, 2013 at 9:30 am in Department 302 for Mr. Ayala to file an amended claim of exemption. Mr. Ayala should fill out the claim of exemption form completely, citing the basis of his claim, and provide additional evidence regarding his financial status. Order signed in open court. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185

Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Jun-06-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances on this matter. The Court adopts the tentative ruling. Plaintiff CITIBANK (SOUTH DAKOTA) N.A.'s Notice of Hearing on Claim of Exemption will be heard in Department 302 on June 6, 2013 at 9:30 am. Judge Pro Tem: Peter J. Van Zandt; Clerk L. Fong; matter not reported. (302/JPT)

Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Aug-28-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - CARLOS AYALA, TEL. NO. 722-3817, DEFENDANT APPEARING IN PRO PER;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - Hearing On Defendant Carlos Ayala's Claim Of Exemption is granted in part and denied in part. The levying officer is directed to release $500.00 to the Judgment Creditor and the rest of the money in the amount of $2,081.10 is returned back to the Judgment Debtor. ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Not reported. =(302/HEK)

Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Aug-21-2012 Continued To Aug-28-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Carlos Ayala, Tel. 415.722.3817, Defendant/Claimant appearing on his own behalf;
No other appearance.

RULING: The Hearing on Defendant Carlos Ayala's Claim Of Exemption is continued to August 28, 2012 at 9:30 in Department 302. The court instructed the defendant to provide documentary evidence, such as paystubs, bank statements, household bills and receipts, credit card statements, etc. as proof of his monthly income and expenses at the next hearing. The court did not find the hand written list that Mr. Ayala submitted at today's hearing satisfactory. Order continuing the hearing was signed by the court. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR # 5976

Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Aug-15-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Carlos Ayala, Tel. 415.722.3817, Defendant/Claimant appearing on his own behalf;
No other appearance.

RULING: Hearing on Defendant Carlos Ayala's Claim Of Exemption is continued to August 21, 2012 at 9:30 in Department 302 for Defendant/Claimant Carlos Ayala to provide a declaration with documentary evidence of his monthly income and expenses at the hearing. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR # 5976
